chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Acq. Appeal No. D – 21 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 26.09.2023 Mr. Shoukat Ali Phul, Advocate for appellant. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Irshad Hussain Dharejo, Advocate has filed power on behalf of respondents No.1 to 3, which is taken on record. Learned Counsel for appellant does not press this Acquittal Appeal, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
